name: Three-Phase Power Calculator
seo_description: Calculate three-phase power in kVA and kW from current, voltage and power factor. Free electrical calculator with instant, accurate results.
example_label: Calculate three-phase power for 32A at 400V with power factor 0.85.
result_context: Sistema three-phase of {corriente_a}A a {tension_v}V with FP={fp} tiene power activa of {power_kw} kW ({power_hp} HP). power aparente: {power_kva} kVA.
formula_display: P = √3 × V × I × FP; S = √3 × V × I
mistakes: Olvidar factor √3 in formula three-phase (Use formula single-phase)
Not Consider factor of power in cálculos of power activa
rc: For a load of {potencia} W at {voltaje} V over {longitud_cable} m, the minimum copper cable cross-section is {seccion} mm².
fd: Current = P ÷ V; Cable size from IEC tables with derating factors
el: Cable size for a 3000 W circuit, 230 V, 20 m cable run
desc: Calculate kW, kVA and kVAr in three-phase systems.
